title: cyperus diandrus f. elongatus
intro: Cyperus diandrus f. elongatus is a variant of the Cyperus diandrus plant, a type of sedge commonly found in various parts of the world. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with Cyperus diandrus f. elongatus include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea or decoction, and can also be found in traditional medicines and supplements.
